description: Style Note This gliders floater is a comfortable footwear that performs well when you're at the gym, taking a brisk walk or jogging in the morning. It's a great foot style option for the health conscious and the comfort junkies! Product DetailsRound toed black floaters with forefoot and ankle loop straps Velcro closure and pull loop on the straps for a customised Fit Soft rubber footbedRubber outsole grooves and lugsMaterial and careSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
